_meta.purpose: Pre-full-run smoke test for v6b action space fixes. Objects selected: 3 flat_no_rim cases (obj_004, obj_007, obj_008). Purpose: verify that Fix A (L_FILL_DOWN replacing L_RIM_UP) does not introduce new regression and bounded search operates correctly.

obj_004.verdict: PASS — no regression. v6b Fix A actions (L_FILL_DOWN, L_KEY_SHADOW_SOFT) both negative but bounded search correctly restored baseline_state. Final = confirmed.

attempts.note: Positive but below improve_eps=0.01. Treated as failed attempt.

obj_007.verdict: PASS — no regression. L_FILL_DOWN gave +0.006 which is below eps and correctly not accepted. Final = confirmed.

obj_008.verdict: PASS — no regression. Both actions negative, bounded search correctly reverted. Final = confirmed.

smoke_test_conclusions.fix_a_behavior: v6b Fix A actions (L_FILL_DOWN, L_KEY_SHADOW_SOFT) are less harmful than L_RIM_UP for 2/3 objects (obj_007 even shows small positive), but still do not reach eps=0.01 threshold on any object.
smoke_test_conclusions.bounded_search_correctness: PASS — each attempt correctly resets from baseline_state. Blacklist correctly prevents retry of failed actions.
smoke_test_conclusions.score_stability: PASS — score_span 0.0 for obj_004/008 and 0.0059 for obj_007 (within stability_threshold=0.03).
smoke_test_conclusions.flat_no_rim_ceiling: The 0.65-0.66 ceiling for these 3 objects is not broken by any Fix A action. This confirms flat_no_rim requires upstream asset improvement.
